# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent memcached exposed port.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
  labels:
    app: web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-app
        image: my-web-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: "memcached-service"
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:1.6
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
        command:
        - memcached
        - -m 64
        - -p 11211
        - -l 127.0.0.1
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  labels:
    app: background-workers
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: my-worker:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: "memcached-service"
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
  - port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
  clusterIP: None
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-app-service
  labels:
    app: web-app
spec:
  selector:
    app: web-app
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
  type: LoadBalancer
